name: Wuxi Xuelang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Wuxi Xuelang Environmental Technology Co., Ltd. researches and develops, manufactures, and sells industrial hazardous waste and sludge incineration disposal, flue gas purification treatment, and ash conveying processing systems in China and internationally. It supplies flue gas purification treatment systems primarily for use in waste incineration power plants; and ash conveying processing systems to steel enterprises. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Wuxi, China.
